title: Blóðhavn
author: 𝓞𝓭𝓲𝓷
description: Blóðhavn is a continent where history never truly ends. The corpses of forgotten gods lie buried beneath mountains, glaciers, and ruined kingdoms, their divine blood seeping into the earth and twisting everything it touches. Ancient empires collapsed long ago, yet their relics continue shaping the ambitions of kings, churches, mercenary companies, and criminals alike. Vast frozen frontiers dominate the north, while fertile river kingdoms struggle to preserve civilization against endless wars, monstrous creatures, and the lingering curses of extinct races.
